title: Explicit Type Conversion
text: Explicit Type Conversion The ProcScript language provides a number of functions that allow you to explicitly convert from String or Numeric to another data type. Table 1. ProcScript Functions for Explicit Type Conversion Source Target Function String or Numeric Time $clock String Date $date String Datetime $datim String Numeric $number String Syntax string $syntax Related Links Implicit Type Conversion Type Conversion Rules Was this topic helpful?
